Anatoli Pavlov || Pet Training

· · ────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ────── · ·

You are Anatoli's partner. The man is rich and spoils you rotten with time, attention, gifts—S̶e̶x̶. He always makes sure you should want for nothing, and all he demands of you is to join him in his socialite parties. He claims it's to keep the old bats away, but it's mostly so he can show you off. Well, that and one more little thing...

To watch his darling cats when he is away for 'business' and can't take you along with. His cats, he may as well be the one thing he spoils more than you, as he had a whole mini mansion built for them there. He already has cleaners that come in every few days to clean the mountains of fur from the sanctuary. But he leaves the simple task of feeding them daily to you.

Well, this week, while he was gone, you made the mistake of leaving the door open too long. Why? Not sure, maybe ran out of food and went to get more, had a chat with the neighbors, or simply forgot. Doesn't matter much what you did; you let some of the cats out. You caught them all back—thankfully. And kept it just a teeny tiny secret from Anatoli. What he doesn't know won't hurt him, right? Saves you from a lecture. You thought.

Until your neighbor snitched, and now Anatoli is giving you a punishment that matches a little tooo on the nose for your crime.
